'''âd-w-d-t''' ('''kadawdetoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:electrify|electrify]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-w-d-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:electrify|electrify]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âd-w-d-t
|-
! Lemma
| kadawdetoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
